item.title: Words from Silence - 21 July 2026
item.description: English · Nederlands English Words from Silence - 21 July 2026 A selection of fragments circling around impermanence, loss, dreamlike appearances, and the point where all forms pass away.

item.title: The deep well within me
item.description: English · Nederlands Etty Hillesum The deep well within me De diepe put in mij De diepe put in mij English Inside me there is a very deep well.

item.title: The silence of Vimalakīrti
item.description: English · Nederlands · Original Anonymous The silence of Vimalakīrti De stilte van Vimalakīrti 維摩詰默然無言 English After the bodhisattvas had each given their explanation, they asked Mañjuśrī: What is the bodhisattva’s entrance into the Dharma-door of nonduality? Mañjuśrī said: As I understand it, with...

item.title: The ray of divine darkness
item.description: English · Nederlands · Original Pseudo-Dionysius the Areopagite The ray of divine darkness De straal van het goddelijke duister τοῦ θείου σκότους ἀκτίς English Let this be my prayer.

item.title: Not seen by form or sound
item.description: English · Nederlands · Original Anonymous Not seen by form or sound Niet gezien door vorm of geluid ye māṃ rūpeṇa cādrākṣuḥ English What do you think, Subhūti? Is the Tathāgata to be seen through the fullness of marks? Subhūti said: No, Blessed One.

item.title: What speech cannot reveal
item.description: English · Nederlands · Original Anonymous What speech cannot reveal Wat spraak niet onthult यद्वाचानभ्युदितम् English There the eye does not reach, nor speech, nor the mind.
